hero.title: Software engineer building distributed systems and on-chain protocols.
hero.subtitle: Currently at node101. Final-year CS at Gebze Technical University. Currently software committee leader of GTU Blockchain.

about.title: About
about.bio1: I'm a final-year Computer Engineering student at Gebze Technical University and a software engineer at node101, building zero-knowledge and blockchain-based products. The work sits close to the infrastructure layer: verification flows, privacy-preserving application logic, and systems that need to hold up under adversarial conditions.
about.bio2: Before node101, I spent over a year at XON doing PHP backend work: database design, API architecture, and large-scale system design for corporate projects. That experience building reliable infrastructure carried directly into the on-chain work I do now. I've been building in the Ethereum ecosystem since 2022, sharpening through ETHGlobal hackathons in Istanbul, Prague, Rome, and Cannes, picking up a first place in Istanbul along the way.
about.bio3: Outside of work, I co-founded GTU Blockchain and lead its software committee. It means building a student engineering team from scratch and closing the gap between research-level ideas and working code. Explaining complex systems to others turns out to be one of the fastest ways to find out what you actually understand.
about.bio4: I'm targeting an MSc in distributed systems for the September 2027 intake, with Politecnico di Milano as my top choice and Politecnico di Torino as a realistic alternative. The goal is to go deeper on the formal theory behind the systems I already build (consensus algorithms, fault tolerance, cryptographic protocols) and come out positioned to work at the protocol layer for the long term.

events.bscTitle: BSc Computer Engineering · Gebze Technical University
events.ethereumDesc: First dApps, first smart contracts. Began exploring the Ethereum ecosystem through self-directed projects.
events.gtuDesc: Co-founded GTU Blockchain with a team, built it from scratch. Leading the software committee and serving on the board.
events.istanbulDesc: Won first place at ETHGlobal Istanbul with Cryptle.
events.ituDesc: Joined Istanbul Technical University Blockchain Society as a full-stack developer.
events.xonDesc: PHP backend development at XON: database design, API architecture, and large-scale system design for corporate web projects. Played an active role in architectural decisions across multiple production systems.
events.node101Desc: Joined node101 to work on Web3 and ZK-based products. Left XON after a year and two months of full-time work.
events.cannesDesc: Built Roam-Swarm at ETHGlobal Cannes, a location-based discovery protocol with on-chain unlocks and AI-generated place narratives.
events.mscDesc: Applying to Politecnico di Milano (top choice) and Politecnico di Torino for distributed systems MSc programs.
